toc.content: "替换 Open Media Vault 镜像源"

pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":"Open Media Vault 是一款基于 Debian 的 NAS 操作系统。"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"替换-open-media-vault-镜像源","children":"替换 Open Media Vault 镜像源"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"登录到已经部署的 Open Media Vault 使用如下命令可以替换 Open Media Vault 镜像源。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["其中的非 OpenMediaVault 部分的镜像站需要分别在 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../debian/","children":"Debian 帮助"}],"，",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../docker-ce/","children":"Docker CE 帮助"}],"，和 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../proxmox/","children":"Proxmox 帮助"}]," 中构造。"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","ol",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["由于 Open Media Vault 自带 kernel backports，因此在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/source.list"}]," 中配置 backports 源会造成冲突。"]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"由于 Open Media Vault 的公钥分发通过源自己携带完成，因此本身存在被篡改的可能性，故在换源后用户需要通过其他渠道验证获取的公钥的正确性。"}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"首次部署-open-media-vault","children":"首次部署 Open Media Vault"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["首次部署操作步骤可参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://openmediavault.readthedocs.io/en/latest/installation/on_debian.html","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://openmediavault.readthedocs.io/en/latest/installation/on_debian.html"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["我们仅对 ",["$r","strong",null,{"children":"Add the package repositories"}]," 段落做出如下调整"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"版本","items":[["7.0 (sandworm)",{"release":"sandworm"}],["6.0 (shaitan)",{"release":"shaitan"}],["5.0 (usul)",{"release":"usul"}]]},{"title":"启用 proposed","items":[["否",{"proposed":"# "}],["是",{"proposed":""}]]},{"title":"启用 partner","items":[["否",{"partner":"# "}],["是",{"partner":""}]]}],"templateId":"template-1","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/openmediavault.list","enableQuickSetup":true}]]}]

" + i);t.b("omv-salt stage run all");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
